title: Discounted cash flow method: net present value (NPV)
summary: 9609 A Level — DCF, discounting, and NPV decision rule.
learningObjectives: Compare NPV with payback and ARR.

simpleExplanation.title: Money today vs tomorrow
simpleExplanation.summary: NPV sums discounted future cash flows minus initial investment. Positive NPV means the project adds value at the required return.
steps: PV of each year's net cash flow.
NPV = sum of PVs − initial cost.

sections.content: **NPV** (10.3.3) is the **preferred DCF method** at A Level. Practise **discount tables**.
